name: ExtensionManufacturedItemDefinition_Ingredient
title: R5: The ingredients of this manufactured item. Only needed if these are not specified by incoming references from the Ingredient resource (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ManufacturedItemDefinition.ingredient` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ManufacturedItemDefinition.ingredient` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ManufacturedItemDefinition.ingredient` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ManufacturedItemDefinition.ingredient` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ManufacturedItemDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ManufacturedItemDefinition.ingredient` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The ingredients of this manufactured item. Only needed if these are not specified by incoming references from the Ingredient resource (new)

element.definition: The ingredients of this manufactured item. This is only needed if the ingredients are not specified by incoming references from the Ingredient resource.
